knownLimitations: Smoke used the current in-app browser viewport, which was narrow/mobile-sized (594x698). Desktop wide viewport was not separately resized in this pass.
Dock smoke covered a Debug tab drag/merge into an existing floating frame. Split-region docking and repeated dock/undock loops remain later QA scope.
